programme.desc: Forbidden Science is a unique blend of noir science fiction and erotic programming. Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing - An Unforgettable Trip, South Lake, Part Two
programme.desc: This show was filmed in late October of 2019. Four months prior, in June of 2019, Tim Carnahan was diagnosed with Glioblastoma, Brain Cancer. According to Tim's medical team, his life expectancy could be between three months and 18 months. Fast forward to now, 2020; today's update is one we hoped would never come. With a heavy heart and tear-filled eyes, we share with you that Tim Carnahan has passed away after battling for close to 12 months. It only fits that the last words to pass his lips were I love you, Lory, and keep fishing. While his time on earth was cut short, the amount of joy he experienced and shared with others was genuinely tremendous and will never be forgotten. If you would like to help out in any way, lory and friends have put together a Go Fund Me page to ease the financial burden of medical bills and afford lory some time to greave and transition into life without Tim. We love you, Tim. Rest in peace, buddy.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep112: Deep White - Why Sharks Attack
programme.desc: Deep White explores ways to research sharks to determine why sharks attack and to study innovative ways to train sharks in order to prevent future attacks. Sharks are surprisingly intelligent and able to perform complex tasks. Sharks can distinguish different signals and cues in feeding routines and they develop strong bonds with their trainers.

programme.title: Blue World Ep502: Muck Diving in Florida + Iceland…The World's Clearest Water
programme.desc: Host Jonathan Bird travels to Iceland to investigate a giant crack in the ground filled with frigid runoff from melting glaciers. It’s rumored to be the clearest water in the world. Next, he heads to sunny Florida, not to dive a coral reef or a spectacular shipwreck, but to dive in shallow, murky water under a busy bridge. This secret spot is home to some of the ocean’s most remarkable, and strange, creatures.

programme.title: Next Stop Ep110: Island of Hawaii

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: This episode kicks off inside the headquarters of Law Enforcement Specialists, where their mission is clear: Prevent. Protect. Respond. From their signed officer wall to their welcoming space for first responders, Bonnie and her team are on the front lines for those who serve. We also get an inside look at their groundbreaking Blue Dispatch software, helping departments streamline jobs and response times. Next, the A-Team travels to Naples, Florida, to celebrate the grand opening of David Beavis’ newest gallery, where his breathtaking photography delivers a powerful message of God’s love and the beauty of creation. Then, Eric Couch of Provision Brokerage shows how his company protects seniors’ “safe money” and builds retirement security for the long haul. Finally, we visit the Connected & Protected call center with president Adam Marsh, where their team makes it simple for seniors to stay safe with innovative, easy-to-use technology.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: After a grueling night braving the elements, the second half of the challenge continues. The All-Stars and Space Cowboys are pushed to the limit when they are tasked with fabricating their own survival structures. Then, catastrophe strikes on the rope climbs, a timber hitch tests the group’s endurance and the day finishes off with Uncle Sam’s Misguided Children’s stress course. Will the All-Stars make it through? Only time will tell.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The challenges have only gotten started. In episode two, the teams must go beyond their limits to come out on top. From the brutal Blah line to building their own shelters with only a small ax, it’s a battle for scoring points and survival that’ll test these elite competitors like never before.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The contestants of “Surviving Mann” are handpicked for their exceptional skills and determination. Under the guidance of survival expert Don Mann, they face a series of challenges designed to push them beyond their limits. Each contestant must adapt, innovate, and collaborate to survive in an unforgiving environment. As the grueling challenges unfold, they discover new strengths and forge deeper bonds. This episode sets the tone for a season filled with intense tests of endurance, strategy, and resilience, with Don Mann inspiring and pushing them every step of the way.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Episode 3 continues with a grueling desert run under Las Vegas’ heat, where endurance is tested to the extreme. As contestants push through, one unexpectedly stands out. They are then trained with cutting-edge weaponry, showcasing their skills on the course of fire. A high-stakes plank competition follows, with only two contestants left standing. Through intense physical and mental challenges, this episode reveals the contestants’ true character and resilience, setting the stage for more survival tests ahead.

programme.title: Marcus Holman and the Moment He Became Obsessed with Lacrosse
programme.desc: Kyle Harrison sits down with Marcus Holman - one of lacrosse’s greatest shooters and leaders - for an honest conversation about family, obsession, adversity, longevity, and chasing the all-time goals record. Marcus takes us back to his earliest memories from John's Hopkins’ locker room to the moment he fell in love with shooting He opens up about evolving his role, becoming a leader, sustaining greatness into his mid-30s, and what it would mean to cement his legacy in the record books.

programme.title: Trevor Baptiste: Pressure, Expectations, and What Comes Next
programme.desc: Kyle Harrison sits down with Trevor Baptiste - the most dominant faceoff athlete of his generation - for an honest conversation about mentality, evolution, pressure, and the moments that shaped his journey to becoming an all-time great. From a chance clinic in eighth grade to a national championship as a freshman, Baptiste opens up about staying even-keeled, proving himself year after year, and why he still believes his best lacrosse is ahead of him.

programme.desc: Jameson Redding explores the Georgia Traverse, a scenic route through the southern Appalachians known for its rugged landscapes and remote waters.

programme.title: Adventure All Stars
programme.desc: Darwin is the capital of Australia’s Northern Territory and a former frontier outpost. It’s also a gateway to the massive Kakadu National Park. Darwin attracts travellers from all around the globe looking to experience its outdoor tropical lifestyle. I...

programme.title: New Zealand From Above
programme.desc: An aerial journey over New Zealand from the deep south of the South Island to the northern tip of the North Island. We discover the landscapes and meet New Zealanders who talk about their work, interests, and culture.

programme.title: Great Destinations Americas
programme.desc: Great Destinations of the World takes you to some of the most beautiful and exotic places on the planet. With unbelievable views and fascinating commentary, you will discover these exquisite destinations hold more history than you ever imagined. Travel...

programme.title: New Mexico
programme.desc: What happens when Abraham Lincoln himself comes to New Mexico to discuss a treaty with Native American chief Acoma (Ted de Corsia)? Can the hotbed of emotions be quieted by cavalry Captain Hunt (Lew Ayres)? Or will the Captains superiors insist on prov...

programme.title: Enemy of the Law
programme.desc: Tex Ritter stars in this western drama about a man who goes undercover to befriend a convict believed to have stolen a shipment of government gold. Also starring Guy Wilkerson as Panhandle Perkins, this offering from Hollywoods Poverty Row features the...

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: A widow with a young daughter travels to a ranch in Wyoming to manage the household of a rancher. After a while the man and woman develop a relationship that leads to a marriage. But life in the harsh place takes its toll.

programme.title: Hurricane Horseman
programme.desc: Pancho Gomez kidnaps Don Roberto and his daughter, Tonita for ransom. Can an undercover lawman named Gun Smith save the pair, or will he be caught himself?! Smith gets a job in Gomez's camp supposedly to repair their guns. Instead he fixes the guns so ...

programme.title: Buffalo Stampede
programme.desc: A big time cast, including Randolph Scott, Buster Crabbe, Barton MacLane, and Harry Carey star in this feature about stampedes, Indian attacks, and plundering thieves! Directed by the esteemed Henry Hathaway (True Grit, Niagara).

programme.title: Part III - The Plains
programme.desc: Gus and July save Lorena from Blue Duck, but at a deadly cost. Jake runs with a bad crowd and pays the price.

programme.title: Part IV - Return
programme.desc: The cattle drive reaches Nebraska, where Gus and Clara reunite.

programme.title: Part I - The Vision
programme.desc: Back in Texas, Capt. Call organizes a mustang drive to Montana.

programme.title: Part II - The Forge
programme.desc: Gideon's mustang drive encounters problems. Agostina must fend off the unwanted advances of cowboys.

programme.title: Part III - The Legacy
programme.desc: Clara's ranch meets an fiery fate, and she decides to join with Gideon.

programme.title: The Gene Autry Show
programme.desc: Gene and Pat set out after a mysterious bandit chief.

programme.title: Raiders of Ghost City
programme.desc: Grit Xtra invites you to saddle up and ride alongside the larger-than-life stars of TV and cinema’s most iconic Westerns.

programme.title: The Gene Autry Show
programme.desc: Gene is falsely charged with murder when he keeps a captured gunslinger's secret rendezvous.

programme.title: The Gene Autry Show
programme.desc: Gene befriends two young orphans whose older brother is involved with the outlaw gang.

programme.title: Rocky Mountain
programme.desc: Rebel officer (Errol Flynn) uses Yankee bride (Patrice Wymore) as bait in Indian country.

programme.title: The San Antonio Kid-Wild Bill Elliott
programme.desc: When a crooked gang terrorizes ranchers to seize their oil-rich land, Red Ryder intervenes, only to find himself targeted by a hired gunslinger who undergoes a change of heart after being saved by the hero

programme.title: Bonanza Season 2 Episode 7 Day of Reckoning
programme.desc: After a Native American man and his wife are ostracized by their tribes and attempt to build a life as farmers on the Ponderosa, a bigoted neighbor’s violent act of revenge triggers a dangerous cycle of vengeance that tests Ben Cartwright’s faith

programme.title: Wagon Train S2E35 The Andrew Hale Story
programme.desc: A disgraced former judge joins the wagon train, seeking redemption while struggling to maintain his authority and moral compass when he is forced to preside over a tense, life-or-death trial involving members of the expedition.

programme.title: Stories of the Century S1E6 Cattle Kate
programme.desc: Railroad detective Matt Clark travels to Wyoming to investigate the powerful and dangerous Ella Watson, known as "Cattle Kate." Clark must navigate local corruption and land disputes to build a case against her, ultimately aiming to put an end to her criminal activities and bring stability to the territory

programme.title: Riffleman S1E8 The Safe Guard
programme.desc: When a local man is accused of murder, Lucas McCain finds himself caught between the community's demand for swift mob justice and his own belief in the rule of law as he attempts to protect the prisoner until a proper trial can be held

programme.title: Between God, The Devil, and a Winchester
programme.desc: A man gains access to a treasure map and persuades a guide (Juan Chasquisdo) to accompany him in his search to recover it. Both are pursued by bandits.

programme.title: Guns Of Diablo 1964
programme.desc: Charles Bronson stars as rugged scout Linc Murdock, caught in a feud with rancher Rance Macklin over the enchanting Maria. Packed with action, rivalry, and frontier grit, this Western drama also showcases a young Kurt Russell in one of his earliest roles!

programme.title: There's a Noose Waiting for You
programme.desc: This sequel to the popular spaghetti western "Clint the Stranger" was released four years after the success of the first film and essentially uses the same plot. George Martin returns as Clint (renamed Trinity in some countries), an ex-gunslinger desperately wanting to be forgiven and accepted by his family that he abandoned years earlier. One major differences in the plot when compared to the first film is the addition of Klaus Kinski as a ruthless bounty hunter. The bounty hunter tracks Clint down and forces him to return to his violent ways to protect himself and his family.

programme.title: Dead for a Dollar 1968
programme.desc: In Dead for a Dollar, Gianni Garko stars as a hired gun drawn into a ruthless battle over greed and betrayal. When outlaws and schemers put a price on life itself, he rides a dangerous trail where every deal is deadly and every dollar could be his last. With brutal showdowns, shifting loyalties, and the grit of Spaghetti Western style, this hard-hitting tale proves that in the West, fortune is bought with blood.

programme.title: Deserts
programme.desc: Host Philippe Cousteau visits the Mohave Desert, and discovers how varied deserts can be; some deserts are covered with sand dunes, while others have amazing vegetation. We also travel to Death Valley, the hottest spot in North America. Then we explore the Joshua Tree National Park, which has the unusual Joshua tree, and many other exotic plants.

programme.title: Canyons
programme.desc: Host Philippe Cousteau travels to the Grand Canyon by helicopter, and gives us a close look at this amazing canyon, which is considered one of the seven natural wonders of the world. We'll also visit Bryce Canyon and its fascinating "hoodoos," which are rock formations sculpted by weather. We'll also dive into the Monterrey Bay and discover an incredible underwater canyon that features some unusual sea creatures.

programme.title: Caught On Clips
programme.desc: The wildest, wackiest, and most jaw-dropping videos. From dangerous severe weather, to heart-stopping close calls and adorable animal antics - all caught on camera.

programme.title: Caught On Clips
programme.desc: The wildest, wackiest, and most jaw-dropping videos. From dangerous severe weather, to heart-stopping close calls and adorable animal antics - all caught on camera.

programme.title: Deserts
programme.desc: Host Philippe Cousteau visits the Mohave Desert, and discovers how varied deserts can be; some deserts are covered with sand dunes, while others have amazing vegetation. We also travel to Death Valley, the hottest spot in North America. Then we explore the Joshua Tree National Park, which has the unusual Joshua tree, and many other exotic plants.

programme.title: Canyons
programme.desc: Host Philippe Cousteau travels to the Grand Canyon by helicopter, and gives us a close look at this amazing canyon, which is considered one of the seven natural wonders of the world. We'll also visit Bryce Canyon and its fascinating "hoodoos," which are rock formations sculpted by weather. We'll also dive into the Monterrey Bay and discover an incredible underwater canyon that features some unusual sea creatures.

programme.title: 250 Celebrating America

programme.title: Wi-Fi
programme.desc: Actress Hedy Lamarr, "the world's most beautiful woman," had a knack for inventing. During WWII, in an effort to help the Allies, she devised a technology designed to intercept Axis communications - and created the foundation of wireless internet.

programme.title: Deserts
programme.desc: Host Philippe Cousteau visits the Mohave Desert, and discovers how varied deserts can be; some deserts are covered with sand dunes, while others have amazing vegetation. We also travel to Death Valley, the hottest spot in North America. Then we explore the Joshua Tree National Park, which has the unusual Joshua tree, and many other exotic plants.

programme.title: Canyons
programme.desc: Host Philippe Cousteau travels to the Grand Canyon by helicopter, and gives us a close look at this amazing canyon, which is considered one of the seven natural wonders of the world. We'll also visit Bryce Canyon and its fascinating "hoodoos," which are rock formations sculpted by weather. We'll also dive into the Monterrey Bay and discover an incredible underwater canyon that features some unusual sea creatures.

programme.title: Deserts
programme.desc: Host Philippe Cousteau visits the Mohave Desert, and discovers how varied deserts can be; some deserts are covered with sand dunes, while others have amazing vegetation. We also travel to Death Valley, the hottest spot in North America. Then we explore the Joshua Tree National Park, which has the unusual Joshua tree, and many other exotic plants.

programme.title: Canyons
programme.desc: Host Philippe Cousteau travels to the Grand Canyon by helicopter, and gives us a close look at this amazing canyon, which is considered one of the seven natural wonders of the world. We'll also visit Bryce Canyon and its fascinating "hoodoos," which are rock formations sculpted by weather. We'll also dive into the Monterrey Bay and discover an incredible underwater canyon that features some unusual sea creatures.

programme.title: Caught On Clips
programme.desc: The wildest, wackiest, and most jaw-dropping videos. From dangerous severe weather, to heart-stopping close calls and adorable animal antics - all caught on camera.

programme.title: Deserts
programme.desc: Host Philippe Cousteau visits the Mohave Desert, and discovers how varied deserts can be; some deserts are covered with sand dunes, while others have amazing vegetation. We also travel to Death Valley, the hottest spot in North America. Then we explore the Joshua Tree National Park, which has the unusual Joshua tree, and many other exotic plants.

programme.title: Canyons
programme.desc: Host Philippe Cousteau travels to the Grand Canyon by helicopter, and gives us a close look at this amazing canyon, which is considered one of the seven natural wonders of the world. We'll also visit Bryce Canyon and its fascinating "hoodoos," which are rock formations sculpted by weather. We'll also dive into the Monterrey Bay and discover an incredible underwater canyon that features some unusual sea creatures.

programme.title: Deserts
programme.desc: Host Philippe Cousteau visits the Mohave Desert, and discovers how varied deserts can be; some deserts are covered with sand dunes, while others have amazing vegetation. We also travel to Death Valley, the hottest spot in North America. Then we explore the Joshua Tree National Park, which has the unusual Joshua tree, and many other exotic plants.

programme.title: Canyons
programme.desc: Host Philippe Cousteau travels to the Grand Canyon by helicopter, and gives us a close look at this amazing canyon, which is considered one of the seven natural wonders of the world. We'll also visit Bryce Canyon and its fascinating "hoodoos," which are rock formations sculpted by weather. We'll also dive into the Monterrey Bay and discover an incredible underwater canyon that features some unusual sea creatures.

programme.title: Caught On Clips
programme.desc: The wildest, wackiest, and most jaw-dropping videos. From dangerous severe weather, to heart-stopping close calls and adorable animal antics - all caught on camera.

programme.title: Caught On Clips
programme.desc: The wildest, wackiest, and most jaw-dropping videos. From dangerous severe weather, to heart-stopping close calls and adorable animal antics - all caught on camera.

programme.title: Deserts
programme.desc: Host Philippe Cousteau visits the Mohave Desert, and discovers how varied deserts can be; some deserts are covered with sand dunes, while others have amazing vegetation. We also travel to Death Valley, the hottest spot in North America. Then we explore the Joshua Tree National Park, which has the unusual Joshua tree, and many other exotic plants.

programme.title: Canyons
programme.desc: Host Philippe Cousteau travels to the Grand Canyon by helicopter, and gives us a close look at this amazing canyon, which is considered one of the seven natural wonders of the world. We'll also visit Bryce Canyon and its fascinating "hoodoos," which are rock formations sculpted by weather. We'll also dive into the Monterrey Bay and discover an incredible underwater canyon that features some unusual sea creatures.
